created_from: uploaded HoshiLM prototype files: mini_gpt.py, make_spm.py, sp.model, sp.vocab, data.txt
branding_policy: No public-facing third-party chatbot branding. HoshiLM-KR is an original toy-scale decoder-only Transformer LM module.

hoshilm_configs.XL_experimental: ~95M params with vocab≈12k, needs much larger corpus

submission_clean_note: Optional chat layer removed in v9 submission-clean package; HoshiLM-KR training module remains.
